extDescription.message: Control your browser with mouse gestures: draw, drag, flick to navigate, search and manage tabs. Customizable and privacy-friendly.

privacyNote.message: Runs locally, no network access except sync, no data collection

supportUsText.message: Enjoying Gestura? Please give us a 5-star rating on the %appStoreInfo% to support us!

feedbackText.message: Issues or suggestions? Please report via Email, GitHub or Forum. We'll improve it ASAP!

feedbackTextChrome.message: Issues or suggestions? Please report via Chrome Web Store Support, Email, GitHub or Forum. We'll improve it ASAP!

aboutPrivacyText.message: This extension is an open-source project with code hosted on GitHub. Contributions and code review are welcome. All data processing is done locally on your device. The extension itself does not establish any network connections and has no backend servers, so it does not collect or upload any user data to external servers. Your saved settings are encrypted and synced between your logged-in devices via %browserName% browser's built-in sync service. This process is entirely controlled by the browser and follows your browser's privacy and sync settings. Note: Brave does not sync extension settings across devices, even when Brave Sync is enabled — this is a limitation of Brave itself, not of this extension. Your settings are still saved on each Brave device; to move your configuration between devices, use Export and Import on the options page.

aboutCreditsText.message:
Gestura is a fork of FlowMouse by Hmily[LCG] & Coxxs - heartfelt thanks to them for the original extension.
Thanks to the Microsoft Edge browser and the crxMouse extension for design inspiration.

aboutFeature6.message: Runs Locally, No Network Except Sync

restrictedPagesDetailsTitle.message: Due to browser security policies, extensions cannot run on certain types of pages.

restrictedNewTabDesc.message: The browser's default new tab page is a protected system page. Extensions cannot inject scripts or modify content here.

restrictedStoreDesc.message: For example, %storeInfo%, etc. Browsers prevent extensions from running on these pages to protect the store's normal operation.

restrictedInternalDesc.message: For example, %browserName%'s internal settings, history, downloads, etc. These pages involve core browser functions and user privacy data, so they are strictly protected.

restrictedFileDesc.message: Local html, pdf, etc. files opened via file:// protocol. Due to security restrictions (preventing malicious extensions from accessing the local file system), extensions cannot work on these pages.

restrictedViewSourceDesc.message: The browser's source code viewer is also a protected system page. Extensions cannot run here.

restrictedOther.message: Other less common affected pages are not listed separately.

engineCancel.description: Cancel button label in the engine editor

transformToggle.description: Checkbox label enabling a custom JavaScript transform for a search engine

transformHelp.message: Write a function body. The variables selection (the selected text) and clipboard are available; return the string that replaces %s. Runs in an isolated sandbox with a ~1s timeout — no access to the page or the extension.
transformHelp.description: Help tooltip explaining the custom JS transform function

transformCodeHint.message: `selection` and `clipboard` are available. `return` the text that replaces %s.
transformCodeHint.description: Hint under the transform code textarea explaining the available variables

transformClipboardOptIn.message: Provide clipboard content to the function
transformClipboardOptIn.description: Checkbox label opting in to passing clipboard content to the transform function

transformRawResult.description: Checkbox label to insert the transform result verbatim into the URL without encoding

transformRawResultNote.message: Your function must return a valid URL component; %s, + and slug encoding are skipped.
transformRawResultNote.description: Note explaining that raw insertion skips %s/plus/slug encoding

transformSampleLabel.description: Label for the sample input used to test a transform

transformTestBtn.description: Button that runs the transform against the sample input

transformIsolationNote.message: Runs in an isolated sandbox with no access to the page or the extension.
transformIsolationNote.description: Note explaining that the transform runs sandboxed

transformFailed.description: Toast shown when a search-link transform script fails; %error% is replaced with the error message

siteMenuAppendEnable.message: Append quick-search bar to every menu
siteMenuAppendEnable.description: Toggle: append the mini search menu to every custom menu

siteMenuDefaultToggle.message: Default menu — shown on all sites without a matching menu
